zh.lifeSummary: 當Andrew Sackville於1286年出生在英國英格蘭素可巴可爾斯特 白 維提哈姆時，他的父親Sir Andrew I Sackville32歲，母親Ermyntrude Molines28歲。他和Joan Mortimer至少有1個兒子。他去世於1330年在英國英格蘭奧可福爾艾明頓享年44歲。

nameMeanings.name: Sackville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Sauqueville (Seine-Maritime) or Sacquenville (Eure).

variants.name: Sackwild
meanings: Jewish (Ashkenazic): from a Yiddish form sakwild, apparently meaning something like ‘game(bird), or venison, in a bag’.

nameMeanings.name: Andrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Greek name Andreas, a short form of any of various compound names derived from andr- ‘man, warrior’. In the New Testament this is the name of the first disciple to be called by Jesus. After the Resurrection, St Andrew preached in Asia Minor and Greece. He is traditionally believed to have been crucified at Patras in Achaia. He was one of the most popular saints of the Middle Ages and was adopted as the patron of Scotland, Russia, and Greece. It has long been among the most popular boys' names in the English-speaking world, especially in Scotland. Its popularity in England was further enhanced by its use as a British royal name for Prince Andrew ( b. 1960 ), the Duke of York.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Andrew Sackville was born in 1286, in Buckhurst by Withyham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Andrew I Sackville, was 32 and his mother, Ermyntrude Molines, was 28. He had at least 1 son with Joan Mortimer. He died in 1330, in Emmington, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44.

ko.lifeSummary: Andrew Sackville(이)가 1286년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 벅후르스트 비 위스이함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Andrew I Sackville(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Ermyntrude Molines(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Joan Mortimer(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1330년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 에밍턴에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Andrew Sackville родился в 1286 г. в местности буккхурст би витихам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Andrew I Sackville было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Ermyntrude Molines, 28. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Joan Mortimer. Он умер в 1330 г. в местности эммингтон, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет.
